subject: Paris weather for JE
body:
Flight time Teterboro to Paris: 6+58 min (Wind +11 kts only).
Fuel stop required.
Wind 24 MPH, Friday, Saturday and Sunday light  rain: high 58 degrees / low 
44 degrees.
Weather Tuesday - Friday: improvement Partly cloudy / High 66  degrees.
